seedOfRecord.draw: the constant hunt — a draw that lands on a fixed number in the predictive path

stimulusShape: reverse-engineer the claim a hand-rolled constant makes: NOVELTY_RESERVE=1 is a fixed pseudocount (one over mass plus one) for P(unseen), blind to whether newcomers have actually been arriving
finding: the reserve grows equally certain nothing new will come whether it just saw three newcomers or none — the reader failing to learn from its own signal

stimulusShape: a probe newcomer after a high-turnover prefix (many newcomers) vs a stable prefix (long confirmation), priors matched; plus a confirmation-probe null; in TWO senses (text proposition field + frequency overtone bins)
detail: control (const reserve) blind 0.26=0.26 (text) / 1.4=1.4 (freq); surface (surprisal) blind 1.82=1.82; mechanism (signal reserve) separates turnover<stable 0.09<0.63 (text) / 0.36<1.23 (freq); null holds; 15/15 checks; omnimodal

stimulusShape: structured draw around a seed — the axes fix the form (turnover vs stable), a random article fixes the content (its capitalized cast); the confirmed reserve dissociation re-run on fresh, off-tuning-set material
detail: 6/6 scored seeds hold the dissociation (signal 0.09<0.63, const 0.26=0.26 invariant to surface tokens); 2 void (material did not yield 5 clean names); a CONFOUNDED trial — const not blind, priors unmatched — is void, not a fail (the instrument precondition)

seedOfRecord.draw: the constant hunt — the sibling constant in the prediction distribution (pNovel = NOVELTY/Z) and the surprisal floor

stimulusShape: the same blindness in the FORWARD object — P(novel figure) for who-acts-next uses the same fixed reserve, so the −log p surprisal of a newcomer is also blind to the recent novelty rate
finding: located, not yet fixed — the signal-derived reserve should also flow into pNovel/forwardDist behind the same gate; deferred as a future pressure (would shift the surprisalBits goldens, needs its own parallel golden)
